---
name: 🚀 Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for the HTX Trading Analytics Platform
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: ['enhancement', 'needs-triage']
assignees: ''
---

## 🚀 Feature Description

**A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see implemented.**

## 💡 Motivation

**Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?**

### Problem Statement
- What specific problem or pain point does this address?
- How are you currently working around this limitation?
- Who would benefit from this feature?

### Use Case
**Describe the use case(s) for this feature:**
- As a [user type], I want to [action] so that [benefit]
- Example scenarios where this feature would be useful

## 🎯 Proposed Solution

**Describe your preferred solution in detail:**

### Technical Approach
- [ ] Backend changes required
- [ ] Frontend changes required
- [ ] Database schema changes
- [ ] API changes
- [ ] Configuration changes
- [ ] Documentation updates

### Implementation Details
**If you have specific ideas about implementation:**
```
Describe technical details, code snippets, or pseudo-code
```

### User Interface Mockup
**If this involves UI changes, provide mockups or describe the interface:**
- Wireframes or sketches
- User flow diagrams
- Design considerations

## 🔄 Alternative Solutions

**Describe alternative solutions you've considered:**

1. **Alternative 1:**
   - Description
   - Pros and cons

2. **Alternative 2:**
   - Description
   - Pros and cons

## 📊 Impact Assessment

### Benefits
- [ ] Improves user experience
- [ ] Increases performance
- [ ] Enhances security
- [ ] Reduces maintenance burden
- [ ] Enables new use cases
- [ ] Improves developer experience

### Potential Risks
- [ ] Breaking changes to existing API
- [ ] Performance impact
- [ ] Security considerations
- [ ] Increased complexity
- [ ] Compatibility issues

## 🎯 Acceptance Criteria

**Define what "done" looks like for this feature:**

- [ ] Functional requirement 1
- [ ] Functional requirement 2
- [ ] Performance requirement (if applicable)
- [ ] Security requirement (if applicable)
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] Tests added/updated
- [ ] Backward compatibility maintained

## 📋 Technical Requirements

### Backend Requirements
- [ ] New API endpoints needed
- [ ] Database changes required
- [ ] External service integration
- [ ] Background task processing
- [ ] Configuration options

### Frontend Requirements
- [ ] New UI components
- [ ] State management changes
- [ ] API integration
- [ ] Responsive design
- [ ] Accessibility considerations

### Infrastructure Requirements
- [ ] Additional dependencies
- [ ] Environment variables
- [ ] Docker updates
- [ ] CI/CD changes

## 🔗 Related Issues

**Link any related issues, PRs, or discussions:**
- Fixes #(issue number)
- Related to #(issue number)
- Depends on #(issue number)

## 📚 Additional Context

**Add any other context, research, or examples:**

### Examples from Other Projects
- Link to similar implementations
- Reference documentation
- Industry best practices

### Research Materials
- Links to relevant articles or documentation
- Technical specifications
- User feedback or requests

## 🏷️ Feature Category

**What type of feature is this?**
- [ ] **Analytics Enhancement**: New trading metrics or calculations
- [ ] **Integration**: New exchange or service integration
- [ ] **Performance**: Speed or efficiency improvements
- [ ] **Security**: Security-related enhancements
- [ ] **User Experience**: UI/UX improvements
- [ ] **Developer Experience**: Development tools or processes
- [ ] **Infrastructure**: Deployment or operational improvements
- [ ] **API**: New or enhanced API functionality

## 🎯 Priority

**How important is this feature to you?**
- [ ] **Critical**: Blocking major use case
- [ ] **High**: Significantly improves experience
- [ ] **Medium**: Nice to have enhancement
- [ ] **Low**: Minor improvement

## ✅ Checklist

**Before submitting this feature request:**

- [ ] I have checked [existing issues](https://github.com/Kaushator/Htx_project_attemp_101/issues) to avoid duplicates
- [ ] I have checked the [project roadmap](docs/ROADMAP.md) (if exists)
- [ ] I have provided clear use cases and motivation
- [ ] I have considered alternative solutions
- [ ] I have specified technical requirements where applicable
- [ ] I understand this is a volunteer project and features may take time to implement
